transcript: Switzerland. This was a game between Finland and Sweden, obviously, which Sweden won 4-3 in the shootout. Anyway, the shot we're discussing here was by Timu Hardikainen. Oilers fans may remember him. He was a prospect for a couple of years and played about 50 games in the NHL. But as for the shot itself, I don't even know how to describe this. I mean, I'm not even sure I understand what's happening, but it seems like it is a full one-handed toe drag, flips the stick onto his face, and then essentially snaps it up. Now, he did miss the net, and I don't even think had he scored, it would have counted.
